subject: GRB 090408A: Erratum in GCN 9188
submitter: Kenzo Kinugasa at Gunma Astro. Obs/Japan  <kinugasa@astron.pref.gunma.jp>
body:
K.Kinugasa et al. (Gunma Astronomical Observatory) ;

I made a typo in GCN 9188. We observed "GRB 090408A (Stroh et al.
GCN 9110)" instead of "GRB 080408A" in subject. 
I apologize for my carelessness.
